creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #1)
> Maintainer seems to be awol.  Could you provide a patch?
I was never notified. I only discovered this by searching
the bugzilla for something else.

I just now built this on current, and I'm not experiencing
any problems. Is this still relevant on your system(s) O. Hartmann?

Thanks for the report.

--Chris
